notes: 15 candidates sourced via YouTube search. IMPORTANT: Lamar is an active player. Active-era NFL content has a higher rate of embedding restrictions than archive content — verify embeddability before adding any ID. Prefer NFL official, Baltimore Ravens official, and NFL Films uploads. The 2019 MVP season and Ravens vs Chiefs rivalry are the highest-priority themes. All IDs sourced from web search — validate embeddability manually.
